description: Tiny real converge smoke: a builder creates a file, a check verifies it, in a sandbox.

builder.instructions: You create or edit files to satisfy the task. Make the smallest possible change and stop.

steps.prompt:
Create a file named smoke.txt in the current working directory whose entire contents are exactly the single word:
banana
(no other text, a single trailing newline is fine).

This is iteration {{ iteration }}. If the check failed last time, here is why:
{{ steps.verify.output }}
